title: Squirrel Removal in Bedford, Westchester | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Bedford, Westchester. Humane extraction, entry point sealing, and damage repair. Call Best Pest Control NYC for fast service!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Bedford's historic estates and wooded residential properties, often invading attics and causing significant damage to homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Bedford, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of protecting Bedford's beautiful homes from wildlife intrusion.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bedford and Westchester County for years, offering licensed and insured squirrel removal with a focus on humane practices and long-term prevention. Our local expertise means we understand Bedford's specific wildlife patterns and architectural styles, ensuring tailored solutions for every property.
localContext: Bedford's tree-lined properties, historic stone homes, and expansive estates provide ideal habitat for gray squirrels seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. From the Bedford Village Historic District to surrounding residential areas, our team is familiar with the architectural features that make local homes vulnerable to squirrel entry.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Bedford?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Bedford typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Bedford homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, Bedford's wooded landscapes and mature trees make it prime squirrel habitat. Squirrels frequently enter attics, especially in fall and winter when seeking warm nesting sites. Historic homes with older construction are particularly vulnerable to entry through gaps in soffits, vents, and roof lines.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Bedford humane?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. We safely relocate squirrels and seal entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring both effective removal and ethical treatment of wildlife.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Bedford?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Bedford are completed within 3-7 days, though timeline varies based on the number of squirrels and accessibility of entry points. We begin with immediate trapping and follow up with exclusion work and repairs to ensure your home remains squirrel-free.
